channel.title: Tech on John's Music & Tech
channel.description: Recent content in Tech on John's Music & Tech

item.title: Force Multiplier: How AI Helped a Software Engineer Bridge the Atari 7800 Hardware Gap
item.description: How AI acted as a 'force multiplier' to bridge the gap between software engineering and retro hardware hacking on the Atari 7800.

item.title: The $51 Printer That Outlived Everything: A 2025 Look at the Brother HL-2230
item.description: A 12-year retrospective on a $51 Brother HL-2230 laser printer that quietly outlived computers, operating systems, and entire life chapters — and still just works in 2025.
